hooks.command: f="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) root=$(cd "$(dirname "$f")" && git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && npx --prefix "$root/apps" prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; *.go) gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac

f="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) root=$(cd "$(dirname "$f")" && git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && npx --prefix "$root/apps" prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; *.go) gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac
